name: Gallery
author: civicognita
description: Media gallery for art projects — responsive grid with lightbox viewer

permissions.reason: Serves media files via nginx container
Reads project media files for gallery display

widgets.content:
## Gallery

Your media files are served at the project's `*.ai.on` URL as a responsive gallery.

### Supported formats
- **Images:** `.jpg`, `.png`, `.gif`, `.svg`, `.webp`
- **Videos:** `.mp4`, `.webm`

Add files to your project directory and they'll appear in the gallery automatically.

prompts.label: Art Assistant
prompts.description: AI assistance for organizing and managing media assets
prompts.systemPrompt: This is a media/art project. Help the user organize their images and videos. The project contains media files served via the Gallery app.
